title: 3D微缩场景创作工具

prompt_en: An isometric 3D cube-shaped miniature room (shallow cutaway true cube; everything strictly contained within the cube). The room is [ROOM DESCRIPTION: Describe the theme, furniture, specific clutter, wall decorati

title: 3D皮克斯风格小女孩与耳廓狐温馨合影
author: Aijaz
prompt:
1. 一个可爱的皮克斯风格 3D 角色肖像，描绘了一个小女孩，她有着大大的、富有表现力的眼睛和圆框眼镜，皮肤光滑柔软，脸颊略带红晕。她留着深色头发，梳成两个凌乱的太空发髻，用红色发圈扎着。她穿着一件舒适的红色针织毛衣，上面有白色冬季图案，以及一条蓝色牛仔背带裤，上面有小块布料细节和轻微磨损痕迹。她的双臂随意交叉。一只可爱的小耳廓狐，长着巨大的耳朵和惺忪的睡眼，正依偎在她的肩膀上，亲昵地靠着她的脖子。

2. 一个可爱的皮克斯风格 3D 角色肖像，描绘了一个戴着大圆眼镜、梳着两个凌乱发髻（用红色发带扎着）的小女孩，她穿着一件红色针织毛衣，外面套着一条浅蓝色牛仔背带裤，上面有小块补丁和磨损细节。她双臂交叉站立，面带温柔的微笑。一只困倦的小耳廓狐依偎在她的肩膀上。背景是纯净的纯色 {argument name="background color" default="coral-red"}。柔和的摄影棚灯光，浅景深，超高细节，高质量渲染，光滑的皮肤，温暖的调色板，舒适温馨的氛围，居中构图，4k，电影级灯光。
prompt_en:
1. A cute 3D Pixar-style character portrait of a little girl with big expressive eyes and round glasses, soft smooth skin, and slightly rosy cheeks. She has dark hair styled into two messy space buns tied with red scrunchies. She is wearing a cozy red knitted sweater with white winter patterns and blue denim overalls with small fabric details and light wear. Her arms are crossed casually. A small adorable fennec fox with huge ears and sleepy eyes is resting on her shoulder, leaning against her neck affectionately.

2. A cute 3D Pixar-style character portrait of a young girl with big round glasses and twin messy hair buns tied with red bands, wearing a red knit sweater under light blue denim overalls with small patches and worn details. She is standing with her arms crossed, smiling gently. A tiny sleepy fennec fox is resting on her shoulder. The background is a clean solid {argument name="background color" default="coral-red"} color. Soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, high quality render, smooth skin, warm color palette, cozy and wholesome mood, centered composition, 4k, cinematic lighting.

title: Q版咖啡少年与迷你吉普
author: @AIwithkhan
prompt: 一个可爱的3D Q版风格角色靠在一辆停着的迷你Q版吉普车旁，穿着干净的单色服装：纯色T恤、直筒裤和极简运动鞋。手里拿着一杯外带咖啡，放松自信的微笑。大脑袋，富有表现力的眼睛，现代渐变发型。舒适的咖啡馆庭院，有木椅，温暖的阳光，柔和的景深，皮克斯品质的3D渲染，俏皮而高级的审美，正方形宽高比
prompt_en: A cute 3D chibi-style character leaning against a parked mini chibi Jeep, wearing a clean monochrome outfit: plain t-shirt, straight-fit pants, and minimalist sneakers. Holding a takeaway coffee cup, relaxed confident smile. Big head, expressive eyes, modern fade haircut. Cozy café courtyard with wooden chairs, warm sunlight, soft depth of field, Pixar-quality 3D render, playful yet premium aesthetic, square aspect rat

title: 圣诞人物迷你雪景瓶
author: samann_ai
prompt:
{
“模型”： “图像生成”，
"input_image": "<PERSON_IMAGE> “，
“提示”：一张超逼真的竖版圣诞照片，画面中一个透明玻璃梅森罐雪球静静地摆放在一张质朴的木桌上。背景虚化，温暖的金色散景圣诞灯点缀其间，营造出柔和的浅景深效果。罐子里铺着厚厚一层蓬松的白色人造雪，点缀着几颗闪亮的银色珠子和鲜红的浆果。雪球里有两个小人：一棵雪绿色的瓶刷树圣诞树，旁边是一个高度逼真、细节丰富的小人，与输入图片中的人物一模一样。小人站在雪地上，与圣诞树的比例相同，身着喜庆的圣诞服装（舒适的针织圣诞毛衣、冬裤、小靴子和一顶饰有白色毛边的红色圣诞帽）。小人的脸部、头发、肤色和五官都与输入图片完美契合，脸上带着温柔的微笑，微微看向镜头。罐子玻璃上绘有磨砂雪花。暖白色的小彩灯随意地缠绕在木桌上的罐子周围，在玻璃上投下闪烁的光芒。超逼真，8K 分辨率。细节清晰，光线自然，画面极具电影感，人物面部没有变形。
尺寸：1024x1792，
n：1
}
prompt_en:
{
"model": "image-generation",
"input_image": "<PERSON_IMAGE>",
"prompt": "Ultra realistic vertical Christmas photo of a closed clear glass mason jar snow globe on a rustic wooden table. Warm golden bokeh Christmas lights in the blurred background, soft shallow depth of field. Inside the jar, on a thick layer of fluffy white artificial snow with a few sparkling silver beads and bright red berries, there are two tiny subjects: one snowy green bottle-brush Christmas tree and, next to it, a tiny highly detailed realistic person that looks exactly like the person in the input image. The tiny person is standing on the snow, same scale as the tree, wearing festive Christmas clothes (cozy knitted Christmas sweater, winter pants, small boots, and a red Santa hat with white fur trim). The person’s face, hair, skin tone, and unique features clearly match the input photo, with a gentle happy smile, looking slightly toward the camera. Frosted snowflakes are painted on the glass of the jar. Warm white fairy lights wrap loosely around the jar on the wooden table, creating glowing reflections on the glass. Hyper realistic, 8K, crisp details, natural lighting, cinematic look, no distortion of the person’s face.",
"size": "1024x1792",
"n": 1
}

title: “雨天阅读”系列：西雅图咖啡文化中的一个小片段
author: minchoi
prompt:
西雅图咖啡店

一张2006年拍摄的数码照片显示，一名留着胡须、穿着条纹衬衫的男子正在一张破旧的木桌上读报纸。他身后的窗户上留有雨痕，遮挡了外面的街道景象。
prompt_en:
Seattle Coffee Shop

A candid digital photo from 2006 shows a man with a beard and a striped shirt reading a newspaper at a worn wooden table. Rain streaks the window behind him, obscuring the street view.

title: 极简主义鸡尾酒摄影
author: @egeberkina

title: 秋日时尚女性写真预设
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt: 制作一幅高分辨率的秋季时尚拼贴画，由12张单独的照片组成，排列成整齐的网格，每张照片都有一个时尚的年轻女子，她有着不同的随机面孔和发型，与任何真实或名人都不相似。让她摆出各种舒适的户外姿势：坐在一个旧玻璃温室旁，拿着一个外卖咖啡杯，沿着一条长满橙色树叶的林荫小路走，独自坐在森林深处的木凳上，靠在公园围栏上，拿着皮革手提包在石阶上休息，穿着短裙和及膝靴躺在绿色公园长椅上，侧身坐在长椅上，站在一个平静的橙树湖畔，站在被高大树木环绕的雾蒙蒙的小路上。服装应混合长羊毛外套、超大毛衣、围巾、宽边帽、中性裤子、针织连衣裙和土色调的靴子，如米色、棕色、奶油
prompt_en:
Try with Google Gemini Nano Banana
Prompt:~
Create a high‑resolution autumn fashion collage composed of 12 separate photos arranged in a neat grid, each featuring a stylish young woman with different random faces and hairstyles, not resembling any real or famous person. Show her in a variety of cozy outdoor poses: sitting by an old glass greenhouse with a takeaway coffee cup, walking along a tree‑lined path covered in orange leaves,sitting alone on a wooden bench deep in the forest, leaning against a park fence, resting on stone steps with a leather tote bag, lounging on a green park bench in a short dress and knee‑high boots, sitting sideways on a bench, standing near a calm lake lined with orange trees, and standing on a foggy path framed by tall trees. Outfits should mix long wool coats, oversized sweaters, scarves, wide‑brim hat, neutral trousers, knit dresses, and boots in earthy toneslike beige, brown, cream, gray, and black; lighting is warm golden hour with soft, cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field and creamy bokeh, giving the entire collage a cohesive, high‑end editorial influencer aesthetic
Signature: Shreya Yadav

title: 景观洞穴入口的形状
author: umesh_ai
prompt: 描述：这是一幅[类型]风景的图片，画面中有一个洞穴入口，其形状与[形状]的轮廓完全吻合。洞穴与山脉崎岖的地形自然地融为一体，入口处清晰地呈现出[形状]的形态。这个[形状]应该简单明了，没有复杂的细节，仅突出整体的[形状]轮廓。周围的环境中包含一些[细节]，但这些元素不应分散人们对洞穴[形状]入口的注意力。场景中的光线应增强[形状]洞穴入口的可见度和辨识度。
prompt_en: Prompt: An image of a [TYPE] landscape, featuring a cave entrance that is shaped exactly like the outline of a [SHAPE]. The cave should blend naturally into the rugged terrain of the mountain, with the entrance forming a clear and unmistakable [SHAPE] shape. This [SHAPE] shape should be simple and defined, without intricate details, emphasizing just the overall [SHAPE] outline. The surrounding environment should include [DETAILS], but these elements should not distract from the cave's   [SHAPE]-shaped entrance. The lighting in the scene should enhance the visibility and distinctiveness of the [SHAPE]-shaped cave entrance.

title: 黎明港湾集装箱装卸场景

prompt: 起重机到地面的过渡，黎明时分的大型造船厂，起重机同步移动集装箱，镜头下降，露出穿着橙色西装的工人，发动机、海鸥和钢制张力电缆的声音，淡金色的灯光，史诗般的工业电影现实主义风格。
prompt_en:
🎨 VEO 3.1  🎨
Prompt :
Crane-to-ground transition, large shipyard at dawn as cranes move containers in sync, camera descends revealing workers in orange suits, sound of engines, seagulls, and steel tension cables, pale golden lighting, epic industrial cinematic realism style.

title: 午夜阳光下的双生世界
author: eviljer
prompt: 一个提示是想象一个故事的倒置宇宙——上面的标志性场景，下面的相反领域翻转了180°，合并成一个连续的形式。相同的角色，不同的情感状态。象征性的物体在各个领域回荡，暗示着丢失或找到了什么。告诉它哪个故事值得它的平行世界。
prompt_en:
Nano Banana Pro Template:
One prompt to visualize a story's inverted universe — iconic scene above, its opposite realm flipped 180° below, merging as one continuous form. Same character, different emotional states. Symbolic objects echo across realms, hinting at what was lost or found. Just tell it which story deserves its parallel world.

title: 九宫格街拍人像模板
author: wanerfu
prompt:
不同城市、不同机位、不同动作，
全是那种“活人感街拍”
⬇️ 万能提示词框架（复制即用）
【场景】城市特色墙面｜大字背景
【镜头】超广角｜仰拍｜俯拍
【动作】挥手｜走路｜比心｜遮阳｜回头笑
【氛围】自然｜松弛｜抓拍感｜通透光
【人物】五官一致｜穿搭一致｜身材比例一致
核心逻辑一句话：
把动作做大，把透视拉满
AI 就会给你“不经意被拍到”的质感
如果你的人像总是“太 AI”，
这个框架会让你瞬间升维

title: 引擎盖上的男神超真实电影感肖像
author: @Kashberg_0
prompt: 超真实电影感肖像，一位自信的男士坐在空无一人的山路上一辆光滑黑色豪华跑车引擎盖上，身穿黑色连帽衫、深色破洞牛仔裤、白色运动鞋，佩戴太阳镜。背景为情绪化的雾霭森林，高耸的松树，阴天，冷调柔和的色彩分级，柔和自然光，对称正面构图。浅景深，清晰的面部与织物细节，戏剧性氛围雾气，高端汽车编辑摄影风格，单反相机质感，50mm镜头，f/1.8，极简奢华氛围。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a confident man sitting on the hood of a sleek black luxury sports car on an empty mountain road, wearing a black hoodie, dark ripped jeans, white sneakers, and sunglasses. Moody foggy forest backdrop with tall pine trees, overcast sky, cool muted color grading, soft natural light, symmetrical front composition. Shallow depth of field, sharp facial and fabric details, dramatic atmospheric mist, premium automotive editorial photography, DSLR look, 50mm lens, f/1.8, minimalist luxury vibe.

title: Action scene from reference photos and sketch
author: エクセル兄さん(たてばやし淳)@ExcelとChatGPT著書多数
prompt: Use the man photo as if he is slipping off the building edge, the woman is reaching out, match the sketch pose and composition precisely, use {argument name="city_style_en" default="NYC"} as the style reference for the scene. High-quality action shot from the 1990s.
prompt_en: Use the man photo as if he is slipping off the building edge, the woman is reaching out, match the sketch pose and composition precisely, use {argument name="city_style_en" default="NYC"} as the style reference for the scene. High-quality action shot from the 1990s.

title: Knolling-style exploded flat-lay photo
author: 宝玉
prompt: Ultra-realistic 8K flat-lay photo in strict knolling style. A top-down 90º shot of the object from the attached image, fully disassembled into {argument name="min_parts_en" default="8"}–{argument name="max_parts_en" default="12"} key parts and arranged in a clean grid or radial pattern on a minimalist {argument name="surface_material_en" default="wooden or matte gray"} table. Use even spacing, perfect alignment, no overlaps, and no extra objects. Light the scene with soft, diffused multi-source lighting, creating subtle shadows, neutral color balance, and crisp focus across the entire frame. Show highly detailed real-world materials (metal, plastic, rubber grips, circuit boards, screws). For every part, add a thin white rectangular frame and a short, sharp English label in clean sans-serif text, placed next to the component without covering it; annotations must be legible but unobtrusive.
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic 8K flat-lay photo in strict knolling style. A top-down 90º shot of the object from the attached image, fully disassembled into {argument name="min_parts_en" default="8"}–{argument name="max_parts_en" default="12"} key parts and arranged in a clean grid or radial pattern on a minimalist {argument name="surface_material_en" default="wooden or matte gray"} table. Use even spacing, perfect alignment, no overlaps, and no extra objects. Light the scene with soft, diffused multi-source lighting, creating subtle shadows, neutral color balance, and crisp focus across the entire frame. Show highly detailed real-world materials (metal, plastic, rubber grips, circuit boards, screws). For every part, add a thin white rectangular frame and a short, sharp English label in clean sans-serif text, placed next to the component without covering it; annotations must be legible but unobtrusive.

title: 裂镜凝视超现实肖像
author: @iamsofiaijaz
prompt: 一幅超现实、电影感的年轻女性肖像，她凝视着一面破裂的镜子，她的倒影被蔓延至面部与颈部的碎玻璃线条所分割。透明玻璃碎片如雕塑感颈圈般环绕她的肩膀，捕捉柔和光线。秋橙色叶片在空中轻柔飘浮，凝固于半空动作，与冷灰色背景形成对比。超精细肌肤纹理，苍白瓷器般肤色，柔和自然妆容，表情平静却内省的澄蓝双眼。浅景深，戏剧性布光配以柔和高光与忧郁阴影，超写实风格，纯艺术摄影美学，高分辨率，锐利焦点，空灵且富有情绪的氛围。
prompt_en: A surreal, cinematic portrait of a young woman gazing into a cracked mirror, her reflection fragmented by shattered glass lines spreading across her face and neck. Transparent glass shards wrap around her shoulders like a sculptural collar, catching soft light. Autumn-orange leaves float gently through the air, frozen mid-motion, contrasting against a cool gray background. Ultra-detailed skin texture, pale porcelain complexion, soft natural makeup, expressive blue eyes with a calm yet introspective expression. Shallow depth of field, dramatic lighting with soft highlights and moody shadows, hyper-realistic style, fine art photography aesthetic, high resolution, sharp focus, ethereal and emotional atmosphere.

title: 人潮消失的神社对比图
author: moor（右麻痺）
prompt: 我让它把新年期间在住吉大社拍的照片里的人“抹掉”，结果他们就像变魔术一样消失了。
prompt_en: お正月に行った住吉大社の写真、「人を消して」と頼んだら、嘘みたいに消えた。

[SUBJECT] depicted in a Mid-Century Modern Lounge Vignette, with sleek lines and stylish furnishings. Employ a retro palette of [COLOR1] and [COLOR2] to create a chic and timeless atmosphere
1. A Siamese Cat depicted in a Mid-Century Modern Lounge Vignette, with sleek lin

title: 复古餐厅浪漫情侣瞬间
author: Synthia
prompt: 一幅浪漫的20世纪50年代餐厅场景：温暖的琥珀色灯光下，一对年轻情侣站得非常靠近，额头几乎相贴；氛围温馨而亲密。背景中复古的自动点唱机闪烁着光芒，红色乙烯基材质的椅子和镀铬装饰点缀其中；霓虹色的“Coke”标志散发着怀旧的色彩。画面具有浅景深效果，构图极具电影感，带有轻微的胶片颗粒感，营造出梦幻般的氛围。这是一个充满情感张力的瞬间，整体风格体现了复古美式风情。
prompt_en:

title: 高清超写实的微距照片
author: @iamsofiaijaz
prompt:
这是一张高清超写实的微距照片，照片中一位身材娇小的小女孩，有着一头乌黑的长发，身着飘逸的棕色亚麻连衣裙，静静地坐在一只红色瓢虫的背上，瓢虫身上布满了黑色的斑点。瓢虫栖息在一片翠绿的叶子上，叶子上缀满了晶莹剔透的晨露。背景是柔和的散景，由模糊的绿色树叶和金色的阳光构成。光线温暖而空灵，捕捉到了露珠的每一个细节以及瓢虫外壳的纹理。
2. 这是一张高清微距照片，展现了一位身材娇小、细节丰富的探险家骑在一只巨大的、闪着虹彩光泽的绿色蜣螂背上。蜣螂有着闪亮的金属外壳，隐约透着金色和蓝色。探险家身着结实耐用的迷你探险装备，栖息在蜣螂的胸部。他们正沿着森林地面上一根长满青苔、腐朽的圆木行进。背景是阳光普照的森林，金色的光芒透过树叶洒下，营造出柔和梦幻般的散景效果。照片清晰地聚焦在蜣螂的纹理上，运用了电影级的灯光效果，分辨率高达8K，画面极其逼真。

3. 这是一张高清电影级的奇幻照片，画面中一位娇小可爱的棕发少女骑在一只巨大的毛茸茸的大黄蜂背上。她身穿棕色皮质探险家套装，挎着一个小挎包。她们飞越一片生机勃勃的草地，草地上开满了硕大而闪闪发光的野花，色彩斑斓，有橙色、黄色和紫色。温暖的金色阳光洒满整个画面，柔和的散景和空气中漂浮的梦幻尘埃营造出梦幻般的氛围。蜜蜂的皮毛和少女的衣物纹理都非常细腻，8K分辨率，营造出一种奇幻而充满冒险气息的氛围。

4. 这是一张高清超现实主义奇幻照片，照片中一位娇小玲珑的女子，长发飘逸，身着精致飘逸的白色蕾丝长裙，优雅地站在一只巨大的帝王蝶背上。蝴蝶清晰可见，鲜艳的橙黑相间翅膀图案跃然眼前。她们漂浮在阳光普照的草地上，草地上盛开着柔焦效果的野花，红、蓝、黄三色交织，营造出迷人的散景。温暖的金色光线（黄金时段）营造出梦幻般的氛围，柔和的镜头光晕和浅景深更添几分梦幻之感。
prompt_en:
1.  high-definition, hyper-realistic macro photograph of a tiny, miniature girl with long dark hair wearing a flowing brown linen dress, sitting peacefully on the back of a large red ladybug with black spots. The ladybug is perched on a vibrant green leaf covered in glistening, translucent morning dew drops. The background is a soft, creamy bokeh of out-of-focus green foliage and golden sunlight. The lighting is warm and ethereal, capturing every detail of the dew drops and the texture of the ladybug's shell. 
2.  A high-definition macro photograph of a tiny, detailed adventurer riding on the back of a giant iridescent green dung beetle. The beetle has a shimmering metallic shell with hints of gold and blue. The rider is wearing rugged, miniature explorer gear and is perched on the beetle's thorax. They are traveling across a mossy, decaying log on a forest floor. The background is a soft, dreamlike bokeh of a sun-drenched forest with golden light filtering through the trees. Sharp focus on the beetle's texture, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic.

3.A high-definition, cinematic fantasy shot of a tiny, cheerful young girl with brown hair riding on the back of a giant, fuzzy bumblebee. She is wearing a brown leather explorer's outfit with a small satchel. They are flying through a vibrant meadow filled with oversized, glowing wildflowers in shades of orange, yellow, and purple. The scene is bathed in warm, golden sunlight with soft bokeh and magical dust particles floating in the air. Highly detailed textures on the bee's fur and the girl's clothing, 8k resolution, whimsical and adventurous atmosphere.

4. A high-definition surreal fantasy photograph of a tiny, miniature woman with long flowing hair, wearing a delicate, ethereal white lace dress, standing gracefully on the back of a giant Monarch butterfly. The butterfly is in full focus, showcasing vibrant orange and black wing patterns. They are floating in a sun-drenched meadow filled with soft-focus, bokeh wildflowers in shades of red, blue, and yellow. The lighting is warm and golden (golden hour), creating a magical, dreamlike atmosphere with soft lens flares and a shallow depth of field.

title: 末日狂沙持枪硬汉
author: @ChillaiKalan__
prompt: 逼真的电影剧照，实拍（无CGI）。完全还原参考照片中人物的特征：相同的面部结构、不对称、皮肤纹理、毛孔、污垢和汗水。不进行任何美化处理。四分之三身像，竖幅：躯干侧倾，头部朝向镜头。双手握着一把粗犷的自制霰弹枪，置于腰间。荒原幸存者——灵感来自《疯狂的麦克斯：狂暴之路》。追求写实、饱经战火的真实感。环境：开阔的沙漠荒原，橙色的沙尘云，饱和的碧蓝色天空。背景：略微模糊的末日追击车辆，营造出即将发生混乱的氛围。微妙的动态模糊和热浪。光线：强烈的沙漠阳光，极强的阴影。阳光漂白的体魄展现出丰富的细节，皮肤上积满灰尘，阴影深邃。汗水和油脂在光线的照射下闪闪发光。服装及细节：做旧的皮革，脖子上围着围巾，沾满灰尘的破旧装备。被风吹乱的头发。脸上沾满了机油和沙砾（写实风格）。画面及色彩：采用35毫米胶片拍摄，柯达Vision3胶片质感。对比度高。强烈的青色和橙色调，逼真的肤色。强调触感真实感：锈蚀的金属、沙粒、汗水、油脂、织物纹理。最终效果：原始、写实；阳光炙烤下，充满活力的电影级静帧。
prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic film still, live-action (no CGI). Preserve the subject’s identity exactly from the reference photo: same facial structure, asymmetry, skin texture, pores, dirt, sweat. No beautification. Three-quarter body portrait, vertical: Torso angled sideways, head toward camera. Hands gripping a rugged improvised shotgun at waist level. Wasteland survivor – Mad Max: Fury Road inspired. Practical, battle-worn realism. Environment: open desert wasteland, orange sand and dust clouds, saturated turquoise sky. Background: slightly blurred post-apocalyptic pursuit vehicle, sense of imminent chaos. Subtle motion blur and heat haze. Lighting: harsh overhead desert sun, extremely hard shadows. Rich detail in sun-bleached physique, sense of dust-caked skin and deep shadow. Sweat and grease catching sharp specks of light. Wardrobe & details: distressed leather, scarf around neck, dusty worn gear. Windblown messy hair. Face smeared with engine grease and sand (naturalistic). Look & color: shot on 35mm film, Kodak Vision3 feel. Contrast. Strong teal & orange grading, realistic skin tones. Emphasis on tactile realism: rusted metal, sand particles, sweat, grease, fabric weave. Final: raw, realistic; sun-blasted, high-energy cinematic still.

title: 紫电女战神
author: @iamsofiaijaz
prompt: 一位强大的运动型女战士站在岩石战场上，穿着战术战斗裤、战斗靴和军用风格短款上衣。她的双臂向前伸出，双手周围盘旋着发光的紫色能量环，带有电火花和粒子。她脸上表情专注紧张，风吹拂着她的马尾辫。背景显示一辆军用吉普车和崎岖地形，浅景深。电影级照明，戏剧性的阴影，超真实皮肤纹理，锐利焦点，动态动作姿势，高细节视觉特效能量效果，好莱坞超级英雄电影场景，8K分辨率，超现实主义，电影级色彩分级，运动模糊粒子，史诗氛围。
prompt_en: A powerful athletic female warrior standing in a rocky battlefield, wearing tactical combat pants, combat boots, and a military-style crop top. Her arms are extended forward, generating glowing purple energy rings swirling around both hands with electric sparks and particles. Intense focused expression on her face, wind blowing her ponytail. Background shows a military jeep and rugged terrain, shallow depth of field.Cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, ultra-realistic skin texture, sharp focus, dynamic action pose, high-detail VFX energy effects, Hollywood superhero movie scene, 8K resolution, hyper-realistic, cinematic color grading, motion blur particles, epic atmosphere.

title: 云中西游香港景
author: xiaobeiLin
prompt:
创建一个超写实的天空场景，柔和、自然的云层有机地聚合，形成一个清晰可辨的【主体】轮廓。云朵形态高悬在明亮蔚蓝的天空中，自然漂浮，其下方是清晰可识别的【景观描述】景观，为画面提供稳固的视觉基础。
画面构图为正方形（1080×1080），云层造型位于画面上半部分，下方的风景使整体场景更加平衡。光线清晰明亮，呈现出日光直射的效果，云朵上有被阳光照亮的高光，增强了层次感、柔软度与真实感。
整体氛围应当宁静、积极、富有视觉冲击力，色彩饱和度高，画面干净纯粹，营造出平和而清新的感觉。

title: 电影级手办创作瞬间
author: @Sareem48

title: 复旦百年时空交融图
author: 宝玉
prompt:
**场景描述：**  
一个水平分割的电影级镜头，展现了同一场景在两个截然不同年代的无缝融合：画面左侧是【年代A】（大约100年前），右侧是【年代B】（现代）。  

**画面左侧（【年代A】）：**  
呈现与当时历史相匹配的建筑、室内设计、材料、交通工具和道具。所有细节都清晰地反映了那个特定的历史时期。人物的穿着完全符合【年代A】的风格，包括发型、配饰以及手中的典型物品（如书籍、雨伞
prompt_en:
nano banana pro 提示词
🎬 一张照片，两个时代的完美融合！过去与现在在画面中自然交汇，跨越时空的神奇互动，尽在眼前。⏳✨
--- 提示词（使用时请替换为自己的场景） ---
一个水平分割的电影级镜头，展现出【场景】在两个截然不同年代的无缝融合：画面左侧是【年代A】，右侧是【年代B】（默认对比为大约100年前与当代）。
在画面的左侧（【年代A】）：
呈现与当时历史相匹配的建筑、室内或环境设计、材料、交通工具和道具，所有细节明确属于那个特定的历史时期。人物穿着完全符合【年代A】的服饰，包括发型、配饰和手中典型物品（如书籍、雨伞、乐器、信件、报纸等）。整体氛围充满怀旧感，历史感真实细腻。
在画面的右侧（【年代B】）：
展示同一【场景】的现代版本，建筑经过更新或翻新，采用现代材料（玻璃、钢铁、LED显示屏、现代家具），配有现代化的车辆或设备，以及当前科技产物（智能手机、笔记本电脑、相机等）。人物的着装风格则完全符合当下潮流。
在画面的中央区域：
两个时代的元素自然地交汇融合，不出现明确的硬性分界线。来自【年代A】和【年代B】的人物在视觉上进行互动：不同年代的人们彼此对视、穿梭于对方所在的空间，或对彼此年代的技术与物品流露出惊奇的神情。建筑和环境实现平滑变形，例如：古老的石制大门渐渐演变为现代校园大门，古典音乐厅装饰渐渐转变为充满未来感的舞台，老街商铺逐渐变成霓虹闪耀的现代商店。
务必确保场景不仅仅是左右简单对比，而是动态的跨时代互动体验，建筑、服饰、道具和人物的动作姿态均清晰地体现两个时代的对比与融合。画面风格为照片级真实感，8K超高清分辨率，电影级光影效果，广角视野，材质细节丰富，具备强烈的时空穿越叙事感。
---
场景：复旦大学校园
时代对比：100年前 vs 现在
画面比例：4:3
